# fly_litefs_cluster (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io LiteFS Cloud cluster. Import using the cluster name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_litefs_cluster" "example" {
  name   = "my-litefs-cluster"
  org    = "personal"
  region = "iad"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the LiteFS cluster. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `region` (String) The primary region. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the LiteFS cluster.
- `status` (String) The cluster status.
